payload.title: cleanup: remove remaining astrologer/spiritual references from production code
payload.body: Codebase audit found 15+ remaining references to astrologer, sacred items, and spiritual content across production code. Remove all of them: AuthService.requireAstrologer(), AuthController astrologer_slug session, ApiController $astrologers variable, MediaService astrologers context, admin dashboard astrologer links, SupportBotService astrologer responses, AgentController astrologerCount, robots.txt astrologer disallow, PublicController 'sacred items' SEO string.
